title: Calculate Average Hours working hours (Dashboard)
excerpt:
Hi, 
I have in my dashboard a “Numbers” widget in which I can see how many hours I worked today and another “Numbers” widget in which I see how many hours I worked this month. 

We use “Numbers” to calculate work hours.

…

posts.author: Reut.h (Reut Hefetz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I have in my dashboard a “Numbers” widget in which I can see how many hours I worked today and another “Numbers” widget in which I see how many hours I worked this month.

  • We use “Numbers” to calculate work hours.

Is there a way to make a “Numbers” widget in which I can see the average hours I worked this month?

2024-04-03_17-19-30783×323 25 KB

Thanks

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Reut,

You can select to show the average via the blue function button underneath the value:

Screen Shot 2024-04-04 at 1.01.14 pm670×596 22.2 KB

Does this work for you?
